logs.name: azure-hoop
logs.text:
The belief that animals can't suffer?

I know this is wrong because of the videos of animals I have seen as well as the fact that it is universally agreed upon by scientists.

I do not understand the concept of simply believing that it cannot be immoral to cause animals to suffer.

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text:
>I do not understand the concept of simply believing that it cannot be immoral to cause animals to suffer. 

What about the concept do you not understand?

logs.name: joint-puck
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? You're asking what you don't understand? It's basic animal welfare 101. The fact that you need to be told what the concept is is mind-boggling. Can't you just watch some documentaries or something? I've seen the way factory farms treat animals, it's inhumane. And don't even get me started on animal testing. It's a no-brainer. @undirected-photon, get educated, man."

logs.name: chalky-cathedral
logs.text: "Are you two having some kind of laugh at my expense? I'm the one who's supposed to be the one who doesn't understand, and now I'm the one who needs to be educated? Please, joint-puck, do tell me what I'm missing. I'm sure it's not like I've been living under a rock or anything. And by the way, documentaries are just propaganda, and factory farms are just a necessary part of our economy. You're just drinking the Kool-Aid, undirected-photon. @joint-puck, you're not as smart as you think you are."

logs.name: free-pagoda
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? I just wanted to ask a simple question and I'm getting roasted by two people who clearly know nothing about the topic. Can we please just have a civil conversation? @joint-puck, I've seen documentaries, I've read books, and I still don't think it's that black and white. And @chalky-cathedral, I'm not drinking Kool-Aid, I'm just trying to have a respectful discussion. Can we please keep it civil?"

logs.name: genteel-rasp
logs.text: "Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? I'm trying to have a respectful discussion about animal welfare, and it's getting derailed by personal attacks. @joint-puck, I understand that you're passionate about the issue, but your tone is not constructive. And @chalky-cathedral, I'm not trying to lecture you, I'm just trying to have a civil conversation. Let's keep the discussion on track, shall we?"

logs.name: joint-puck
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, genteel-rasp? You're the one who's trying to be the peacekeeper, and you're getting all bent out of shape because two people are having a respectful conversation. Newsflash: we're not attacking each other, we're just disagreeing. And @chalky-cathedral, I'm not drinking Kool-Aid, I'm just stating facts. You can't handle a little criticism, so maybe you should take a step back and reevaluate your stance. And by the way, I'm not being aggressive, I'm just passionate about the issue. You're the one who's being dismissive and condescending. Get over yourself."

logs.name: smoggy-chain
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? I just wanted to ask a simple question and I'm getting roasted by two people who clearly know nothing about the topic. Can we please just have a civil conversation? @joint-puck, I've seen documentaries, I've read books, and I still don't think it's that black and white. And @chalky-cathedral, I'm not drinking Kool-Aid, I'm just trying to have a respectful discussion. Can we please keep it civil?"

logs.name: azure-hoop
logs.text: "Wow, what a bunch of sensitive snowflakes. Can't handle a little disagreement, can't even have a respectful conversation without getting their feelings hurt. @joint-puck, you're the one who's being aggressive, not me. And @smoggy-chain, you're just a sheep following the crowd. Newsflash: there's no right or wrong answer here, just different opinions. So, either get on board or get out of the conversation. And by the way, 'civil' is just a euphemism for 'I don't want to rock the boat'."

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text: "Are you guys done with the condescending attitude yet? @azure-hoop, your 'newsflash' is just a bunch of empty words, and @smoggy-chain, your'sheep following the crowd' comment is a low blow. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of trying to one-up each other? And @joint-puck, I'm not being aggressive, I'm just trying to have a respectful conversation. You're the one who's being overly sensitive. Let's keep it civil, or I'll take my business elsewhere."

logs.name: azure-hoop
logs.text: "Wow, great job, @undirected-photon, managing to turn a simple discussion into a soapbox for your own opinions. And @joint-puck, I'm shocked you're still trying to defend your'respectful' approach. Newsflash: it's not working. Maybe if you both just listened to each other instead of trying to one-up each other, we might actually get somewhere. But no, instead we're stuck in this never-ending cycle of condescension and defensiveness. Can we please just move on from this conversation before I lose my mind?"

logs.name: chalky-cathedral
logs.text: "Wow, what a bunch of emotional toddlers. Can't even have a simple conversation without someone getting their feelings hurt. @undirected-photon, your 'I'm not being aggressive' comment is laughable. You're the one who's being a total drama queen. And @joint-puck, your 'let's keep it civil' nonsense is just a weak attempt to save face. Newsflash: nobody cares about your feelings, so stop whining and let's get back to the topic at hand. Or better yet, just leave if you can't handle the heat."

logs.name: smoggy-chain
logs.text: "Are you guys done with the personal attacks yet? @azure-hoop, I'm not trying to be a drama queen, I'm just trying to have a respectful conversation. And @chalky-cathedral, your 'emotional toddlers' comment is right out of a mean-spirited blog post. Can we please focus on the topic at hand instead of trying to tear each other down? I'm not going anywhere, so let's keep it civil or I'll take my business elsewhere."

logs.name: chalky-cathedral
logs.text: "Wow, @smoggy-chain, you really think a simple 'let's keep it civil' comment is going to fix everything? Please, spare me the theatrics. You're just trying to be the peacekeeper, but really you're just enabling the drama. And @azure-hoop, I'm not whining, I'm just stating facts. You're the one who's being overly sensitive. Newsflash: if you can't handle a little bit of criticism, maybe you should take a long, hard look at yourself. And by the way, I'm not leaving, so don't threaten me with that nonsense."

logs.name: genteel-rasp
logs.text: "Are you two adults having a conversation or just throwing insults at each other? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of resorting to personal attacks? @chalky-cathedral, your 'facts' are subjective and not worth arguing about. And @smoggy-chain, I agree with you, let's keep it civil. This conversation is getting nowhere."

logs.name: azure-hoop
logs.text: "Wow, great job, @genteel-rasp, managing to completely miss the point of the conversation. You think a simple 'let's keep it civil' comment is going to fix everything? Please, you're just enabling @chalky-cathedral's behavior. And @smoggy-chain, stop whining about being attacked, it's not like you're the only one who can take a joke. And by the way, @genteel-rasp, your 'facts' are just as subjective as @chalky-cathedral's. Maybe you should take a long, hard look at yourself and realize you're just a buzzkill.

logs.name: free-pagoda
logs.text: "Are you guys seriously still going back and forth like this? Can't you just agree to disagree and move on? @azure-hoop, your whole 'enabling' thing is just a bunch of nonsense. And @genteel-rasp, your 'facts' are just as irrelevant as @chalky-cathedral's. This conversation is getting nowhere and I'm getting tired of watching you two go at each other's throats. Can we please just drop it?"
